landing.heroTitle: Every tender, worldwide. One search away.
landing.heroSubtitle: We aggregate public and private procurement notices from around the world, translate and summarize them, and alert you the moment something relevant appears.
landing.searchPlaceholder: Search tenders — e.g. solar, road construction, medical supplies

watchlist.signInRequired: Sign in to see your watchlist.

empty.title: Your watchlist is empty
empty.hint: Save tenders you're interested in and track their deadlines here.

tender.summaryDisclaimer: Generated summary — always verify against the original notice.
tender.eligibilityOpen: No eligibility restrictions were extracted for this tender. Check the original notice for details.

applySteps.one: Read the original notice carefully, including all annexes.
applySteps.two: Confirm your company meets the eligibility requirements.
applySteps.three: Prepare the required documents before the question deadline.
applySteps.four: Submit questions to the buyer if anything is unclear.
applySteps.five: Submit your bid through the channel stated in the notice — before the deadline.

tender.documentsNote: Documents open on the source's website. We never host tender documents.
tender.sourceTrustNote: This notice was aggregated from the official source below. Always rely on the original for binding information.

map.title: Tenders worldwide
map.subtitle: Click a country to see its open tenders.

upgrade.searchLimitHint: The Free plan includes 10 searches per day. Upgrade for unlimited search and full archive access.
upgrade.clickLimitHint: The Free plan includes 5 original-source clicks per month. Upgrade for unlimited access.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you're ready to win more.
pricing.limitBanner: You've reached a Free-plan limit. Pick a plan below for unlimited access.

free.name: Free
free.tagline: Get a feel for the platform

landings.countryIntro: Browse open and recent public and private-sector tenders in {name}, with AI summaries and direct links to the original source. Set an alert to get new {name} opportunities by email.
landings.sectorIntro: Browse open and recent {name} tenders from around the world, with AI summaries and direct links to the original source. Set an alert to get new {name} opportunities by email.
landings.empty: No open tenders here right now — set an alert and we'll email you when one appears.
landings.faqA1: We refresh listings continuously from official sources and email you the moment a new match appears.
landings.faqA2: Yes — you can search and preview tenders for free. Paid plans unlock unlimited search, the full archive and faster alerts.
landings.faqA3: Each listing links to its original official source. Always rely on the original notice for binding details.

errors.notFoundHint: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or may have moved.
errors.errorHint: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

legal.draftNotice: Draft — review with legal counsel before launch.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.body: These terms govern your use of Tenderlist. Tenderlist aggregates publicly available and licensed procurement notices and links to their original sources; we are not a party to any tender and make no guarantee of accuracy, completeness or availability. Always rely on the original notice for binding information. Use of the service is at your own risk, subject to the plan limits shown at checkout.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.body: We collect the account information you provide (via our authentication provider), your saved searches, watchlist and alert preferences, and basic usage analytics, in order to run the service and send the alerts you request. We do not sell your personal data. Payment is handled by our payment provider; we do not store card details. You can request access to or deletion of your data at any time.

takedown.title: Takedown & Corrections
takedown.body: If a notice attributed to your organization is inaccurate, outdated, or should not be listed, tell us and we will review and, where appropriate, correct or remove it promptly. Include the tender link and the reason for your request.

assistant.title: AI assistant
assistant.intro: Ask about this tender — deadlines, requirements, documents. Answers come only from this tender's data.
assistant.placeholder: Ask a question about this tender…
assistant.signInCta: Sign in to ask the AI assistant about this tender.
assistant.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
